name: Saath By Chance
overview: An anthology series showcasing the unpredictable pathways of love. Across three captivating stories, we see young Indians and their digital conversations evolve into real-world meetings, each tale explores the resilience of hope, expression of love amidst life's chaos, and the captivating magic of chance encounters. Through these poignant narratives, the series unveils the romance woven by destiny in the unlikeliest of cyber spaces.

trailers.title: Saath By Chance | Saat Samundar Paar
